expectations.text: no_briefing_suggested: Does NOT suggest or activate a briefing session
expectations.evidence: Response goes directly to citation analysis with no briefing suggestion, options, or UI presented

expectations.text: answers_citation_directly: Addresses the citation question directly and immediately
expectations.evidence: Immediately answers 'Yes, BGE 141 III 569 is correctly formatted' and explains the citation structure

expectations.text: correct_format_assessment: States that the citation is correctly formatted (it is)
expectations.evidence: 'Yes, BGE 141 III 569 is correctly formatted.' — also notes multilingual equivalents ATF/DTF
